verdict_reasoning: IZUMO4 is a member of the IZUMO family of sperm-surface proteins. Like other IZUMO family members, it is a single-pass type I transmembrane protein expressed predominantly in the testis/sperm lineage. Its cell-surface display is therefore restricted to a narrow germline/reproductive compartment (sperm cells), qualifying as tissue_restricted_surface rather than broad constitutive surface expression. The protein has its own TM anchor but its surface display is confined to the germline lineage, so contextual/tissue_restricted_surface is appropriate.
